name: io.github.predgeai/whale-data-mcp
description: Polymarket whale trades and smart-money signals as agent tools, paid per call via x402.

environmentVariables.name: BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Funded Base-mainnet key that signs USDC micropayments. Required for paid tools; the free discovery tool works without it.

environmentVariables.name: X402_NETWORK
environmentVariables.description: x402 network: 'base' (mainnet, real USDC) or 'base-sepolia' (only against a testnet deployment).

environmentVariables.name: MAX_PRICE_USD
environmentVariables.description: Hard per-call price cap in USD. Calls priced above it are refused before any payment. Default 0.05.

environmentVariables.name: PREDGE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to the production deployment.
